sources.title: The First Grader.limited.dvdrip.xvid
sources.description: The story of an 84 year-old Kenyan villager and ex Mau Mau veteran who fights for his right to go to school for the first time to get the education he could never afford.

metadata.Plot: Set in a mountain village in Kenya the film tells the remarkable true and uplifting story of a proud old Mau Mau veteran who is determined to seize his last chance to learn to read and write - and so ends up joining a class alongside six year-olds. Together he and his young teacher face fierce resistance, but ultimately they win through - and also find a new way of overcoming the burdens of the colonial past.
metadata.Actors: Naomie Harris, Oliver Litondo, Tony Kgoroge
metadata.Country: United Kingdom, United States, Kenya, France
